## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Deepgram and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pruning efforts underway; GrowthX to finalize list of posts to prune/refresh by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [12% organic traffic growth week-over-week, potentially due to Google's September core update](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [New content publishing resumed (5 posts/week); 3 published, 1 pending, 5 in review](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Wireframe template for language pages in progress; Patricia (Deepgram) to create test page](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

## Topics

### Content Pruning Strategy

  - [GrowthX to create Looker dashboard page tracking performance of remaining blog posts post-pruning](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Aida compiling 4-5 case studies on successful content pruning for internal communication](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [More refresh opportunities found than pruning so far; case-by-case evaluation ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Hasan/Jose to review GrowthX's pruning candidates before final decisions](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Organic Traffic Growth

  - [12% growth w/w in GA4, primarily driven by homepage traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [AI Apps (Cutout Pro) page saw \~100% growth w/w](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Potential attribution to Google's September core update (spam-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [SEMrush shows steady organic keyword rankings over past months](https://fathom.video/share/ESqRu2HBsJTHZDEA6qkyS4cvXEAKgonR?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
